Step 1 • T25 Fasteners0 / 7 removed

Air Filter Housing

Passenger side • Alex Verified ✓

ToolT25 Torx
Difficulty1 / 5
Time5–10 min
LayerIntake • L1
PurposeFilters incoming air before the MAF sensor and throttle body.
Garage TipsUses T25 Torx. Lift the rear of the lid first. Don’t yank on the MAF wiring. Vacuum debris from the lower housing.

Remove the T25 screws

Tap each blue dot after removing that screw. The dot turns green so you can track progress.

Fastener removed
